events.reasoning: Game over. Died to Sentries at Floor 7.
Starting WATCHER A0
Starting the run - talking to Neow for blessing options

events.translated: [ Enemies in your next three combats have 1 HP ]
events.reasoning: Enemies with 1 HP for 3 combats is amazing - free wins, free card rewards, no HP loss. Lets us path aggressively early.
Leaving Neow with Neows Lament - 3 free fights ahead
Leaving Neow with Neows Lament - 3 free fights ahead

events.translated: Strike → Louse → Strike → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: Both louses at 1 HP from Neows Lament. One strike each to kill.
Checking card reward options
Consecrate is 0 cost AOE. Free damage in multi-enemy fights without spending energy. Good early pick for Watcher.
Moving to map to choose next path
Only path available. Monster at F2 will be free kill with Neows Lament (2 charges left). Planning route toward Elite at F6 after building deck through free fights.

events.translated: Strike → Acid Slime (S) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Both slimes at 1 HP from Neows Lament. Strike each to kill.
Taking Liquid Memories potion - lets me retrieve a card from discard pile. Useful for burst turns.
Checking card reward options
Signature Move is too restrictive for burst turns. Fasting debuffs hurt. Tranquility is redundant with Vigilance. None solve key needs.
Done with rewards, moving to map for next floor
Monster at F3 uses last Neows Lament charge for a free win and card reward. Building deck before elite at F6.
Cultist at 1 HP. One strike to kill.
Bottled Miracle gives 2 Miracles in hand at start of combat - free energy for burst turns. Excellent for Watcher one-shot paradigm.
Viewing card reward
Inner Peace is top tier - Wrath exit (enters Calm) AND draws 3 when already in Calm. Essential for one-shot paradigm setup turns. Draws into burst pieces.
Moving to map for next floor
Only path available. First real fight - deck has Consecrate and Inner Peace now. Path leads to Shop at F5 and Rest at F6.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Jaw Worm + Acid Slime (M)
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)
WIN CONDITION: Kill both with Wrath burst when ready
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block fully in Calm, wait for Eruption + damage cards
KEY CARDS: Eruption (Wrath entry), Inner Peace (draw/Calm entry), Consecrate (free AOE)
POTION PLAN: Save potions for elites/boss

Turn 1 analysis:
- Intents show DEBUG so I cant see incoming damage yet
- Hand: Miracle(0E), Inner Peace(1E), Consecrate(0E), Strike(1E), 2x Defend(1E each)
- I start in no stance. Best plan: play Consecrate(free AOE for 5 each), then block.
- Inner Peace when NOT in Calm draws 3 cards... wait no. Inner Peace: if in Calm, draw 3. If not in Calm, enter Calm.
- So Inner Peace enters Calm (costs 1E). Then next turn I get +2E when leaving Calm.
- Plan: Consecrate(0E, 5 AOE) + Inner Peace(1E, enter Calm) + Defend(1E) + Defend(1E) = 3E used, 10 block + enter Calm.
- Save Miracle for burst turn energy.

MARGIN NOTE: DEBUG intent means I cant see exact incoming. Jaw Worm turn 1 is usually Chomp (11 damage) or buff. Acid Slime M turn 1 is Tackle (3x3=9) or Corrosive Spit (7+slimed). Worst case: 11+9=20 incoming. My 10 block is not enough for full block.

Revised: Consecrate(0E) + Defend(1E) + Defend(1E) + Strike(1E, Jaw Worm) = 3E. 10 block + 6 damage + 5 AOE.
Or: Consecrate(0E) + Inner Peace(1E, Calm) + Miracle(0E, +1E) + Defend(1E) + Defend(1E) = 3E. 10 block + enter Calm + 5 AOE.

Second option is better - I enter Calm for +2E next turn, enabling a bigger burst later.

events.command: play Consecrate; play Inner Peace; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Consecrate → Inner Peace → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup turn: Consecrate for 5 AOE, Inner Peace enters Calm for +2E next turn, double Defend for 10 block. Saving Miracle for burst turn.

events.command: play Miracle; play Strike 1; play Strike 0; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Miracle → Strike → Acid Slime (M) → Strike → Jaw Worm → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Stay in Calm - no Wrath exit in hand. Miracle for +1E (4E total). 2 Strikes on Acid Slime (12 damage to kill it faster) + 1 Strike on Jaw Worm, 2 Defends for 10 block. Incoming 14, take 4.

events.command: play Consecrate; play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Consecrate → Eruption → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: ONE-SHOT TURN: Consecrate(0E, 5 AOE removes Jaw Worm block) -> Eruption(2E, enters Wrath from Calm +2E, 18 to JW) -> Strike(1E, 12 in Wrath to JW) = 30 damage kills Jaw Worm(30HP). Vigilance(2E) exits to Calm with 8 block. Take 10-8=2 from Acid Slime.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Jaw Worm: 3 Strikes = 18 damage vs 9 HP + 5 block (14 needed). Overkill but ensures death. Take 7 from Acid Slime unblocked.

events.command: play Slimed; play Slimed; play Strike 1; end
events.translated: Slimed → Slimed → Strike → Acid Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn - DEBUFF intent means no damage incoming. Exhaust both Slimed to thin deck. Strike Acid Slime for 6 (16->10 HP).
Eruption from Calm enters Wrath. 9x2=18, Weakened 75%=13. Kills Acid Slime (10 HP). Fight over.

Kill Acid Slime (4 HP). Strike deals 6. Fight over. MARGIN NOTE: Eruption did NOT get Wrath doubling - dealt only 6 (9 base weakened). Wrath doubled the INCOMING damage (10x2=20). Critical lesson: Eruption entering Wrath does NOT double its own damage.
Viewing card reward
Wheel Kick is TOP TIER for one-shot paradigm: 15 damage + draw 2 for 2E. In Wrath thats 30 damage AND fuels the burst turn with more cards.
Moving to map. At 24/72 HP - need to path toward rest or shop for recovery.
Shop at F5 then Rest at F6. Need to recover from 24/72 HP. Can potentially remove a Strike at shop and rest to heal.
Waiting for shop inventory to load
Waiting for shop inventory to load
Opening shop
Trying to interact with shop
Remove a Strike to thin deck - better draw quality for key cards like Eruption, Inner Peace, Wheel Kick. 75g.
Removing a Strike - weakest attack card in deck. Thins to 12 cards for better draw consistency.
Confirming Strike removal
Strength Potion +2 Str for a fight. Boosts all damage in burst turns. 51g, leaves 43g.
Done shopping. Removed Strike, bought Strength Potion. Heading to Rest at F6 to heal.
Leaving shop, heading to map
Rest site at F6. Must heal - at 33% HP is dangerously low.
Healing from 24 to ~45 HP. At 33% HP cannot afford to skip rest even though upgrading Eruption would be ideal.
Rested. Moving to map at 45/72 HP.
Monster at F7. At 62% HP with good deck (Wheel Kick, Inner Peace, Consecrate). Time to fight clean and take zero damage.

FIGHT STRATEGY - 3 Louses
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)
WIN CONDITION: Kill all 3 with burst turn or kill them one by one
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block fully each turn while chipping
KEY CARDS: Consecrate (AOE triggers all Curl Up), Inner Peace (Calm), Eruption (Wrath burst)
POTION PLAN: Save for elites/boss

Turn 1: Intents are DEBUG/6/7. Estimated incoming: ~6+7+6=19ish (lice attack for 5-7)
- Louse[0]: 12 HP, Curl Up 3. Louse[1]: 15 HP, Curl Up 7. Louse[2]: 12 HP, Curl Up 3.
- Consecrate (5 AOE) will trigger ALL Curl Ups. After Consecrate: 
  - L0: 12HP, 3 block absorbs 5 -> takes 2 damage -> 10 HP, 0 block (Curl Up gone)
  - L1: 15HP, 7 block absorbs 5 -> takes 0 damage -> 15 HP, 2 block remaining (Curl Up gone)  
  - L2: 12HP, 3 block absorbs 5 -> takes 2 damage -> 10 HP, 0 block (Curl Up gone)

Wait - does Curl Up work that way? Curl Up gives X block when first attacked. So Consecrate triggers it, they get their Curl Up block, then Consecrate damage applies vs that block.

After Consecrate: all Curl Ups triggered, most damage absorbed by the block.

Plan: Consecrate(0E) + Defend(1E) + Vigilance(2E) = 3E. 5 AOE + 5 block + 8 block + enter Calm = 13 block.
If incoming is ~19, I take 6 damage. Not zero but decent.

Or: Consecrate(0E) + Miracle(0E, +1E) + Defend(1E) + Vigilance(2E) + Strike(1E) = 4E. 
5 AOE + 5 block + 8 block + 6 damage to one = 13 block + chip. Same block, more damage.

Actually wait - Vigilance enters Calm AND gives 8 block. If I play Miracle for +1E, I have 4E total.
Consecrate(0E) + Miracle(0E) + Defend(1E) + Strike(1E, target weakest) + Vigilance(2E) = 4E.
That gives 5 AOE + 5 block + 8 block + 6 to one target = 13 block total and enter Calm.

Incoming ~19, block 13, take ~6 damage. Not zero but acceptable for a 3-enemy fight turn 1.

Hmm - can I get to zero? I need 19+ block. Defend(5) + Vigilance(8) + Miracle(+1E) + Defend... I only have 1 Defend.
Max block: Miracle(0E) + Defend(1E, 5 block) + Vigilance(2E, 8 block) = 3E = 13 block. Not enough for 19.

Accept 6 damage. Best plan: Consecrate + Miracle + Defend + Strike + Vigilance (4E, 13 block, enter Calm, some damage).
Actually Strike first is better to use its damage before entering Calm. But Im not in any stance so no doubling.

MARGIN NOTE: With 3 louses, the one-shot paradigm says wait until I can burst all 3 in one Wrath turn. Lice have low HP (10-15) so AOE in Wrath should handle them.

events.command: play Consecrate; play Miracle; play Strike 0; play Defend; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Consecrate → Miracle → Strike → Louse → Defend → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1: Consecrate triggers Curl Up on all 3 (5 AOE mostly absorbed by block). Miracle for +1E. Strike weakest louse for 6. Defend(5) + Vigilance(8) = 13 block. Enter Calm for +2E next turn.
In Calm so Inner Peace draws 3 cards! Draw pile has Defend and Wheel Kick. Must check drawn cards before continuing.
Only 2E left after Inner Peace. Defend x2 = 10 block vs 22 incoming. Take 12 damage (45->33). Staying in Calm for +2E next turn with Eruption and Wheel Kick in hand for burst.

events.command: play Consecrate; play Eruption 1; play Strike 2; end
events.translated: Consecrate → Eruption → Louse → Strike → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: ONE-SHOT: Consecrate(5 AOE) kills Louse[0](4HP), wounds [1] to 5HP and [2] to 2HP. Eruption from Calm on Louse[1](9 damage kills 5HP). Strike in Wrath on Louse[2](12 kills 2HP). All 3 dead!
Viewing card reward. Skipping Distilled Chaos - NEVER use as Watcher.
None fit the one-shot paradigm. Signature Move too restrictive, Swivel is a worse Vigilance, Worship needs too many plays for Divinity.
Done with rewards. Moving to map.
Rest at F8. At 45% HP need to heal. Path leads to Treasure at F9, then can route toward Elite at F11 in better shape.
Healing 33->54 HP. Would love to upgrade Eruption but cant afford to be at 45% going into more fights.
Healed to 54/72 (75%). Moving forward.
Treasure room - free relic with no risk. Then path toward Unknown/Monster/Elite.
Taking 24 gold
Taking Regal Pillow - extra 15 HP healing at rest sites. Addresses the Watcher healing problem. The Sapphire Key would forfeit the relic and we need to win the run first, not fight the Heart.
Collected relic and gold. Moving to map.
Unknown at F10. At 75% HP this should be safe. Could be event or fight. Route toward Elite at F11 to get a relic.

events.translated: [Reach Inside] Lose 3 HP. 25%: Find a Relic.
events.reasoning: Reach inside Scrap Ooze. 3 HP for 25% relic chance. At 54 HP can afford the HP cost. Relics compound for rest of run.
35% relic chance for 4 HP. At 51 HP still comfortable. Another try.
45% relic chance for 5 HP. Nearly coin flip odds, very positive EV. At 47 HP can afford it.
55% relic chance! Over coin flip. 6 HP leaves me at 36 which is still workable with rest sites ahead.
Got The Boot relic. Leaving event.
Fighting Elite at F11. At 36 HP but have 3 potions (Strength, Bottled Miracle, Liquid Memories) to support burst. Elite relic compounds for rest of run. Path to Rest at F12 after elite.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob (ELITE)
FIGHT TYPE: Hard-scaler (kill speed critical)
WIN CONDITION: Kill before Str scaling becomes lethal. Nob gains +2 Str per Skill played.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: CANNOT block efficiently - block cards are Skills that feed Nob Str. Focus on kill speed.
KEY CARDS: Eruption (attack), Wheel Kick (attack + draw), Strike (attack), Consecrate (attack AOE)
POTION PLAN: Use Strength Potion NOW for +2 Str on all attacks. Bottled Miracle gives 2 Miracles (Skills! -dont use unless needed for energy). 
RISKS: Every Skill gives Nob +2 Str. Minimize Skills. Accept taking damage.

Nob pattern: Turn 1 buffs (Enrage), then alternates ATTACK (32+) and SKULL BASH (8 dmg + Vulnerable).

Turn 1: Nob is buffing (DEBUG intent likely). FREE TURN.
- I want maximum damage. 
- Attacks available: Strike(1E, 6), Wheel Kick(2E, 15+draw2), Eruption(2E, 9 enters Wrath), Consecrate(0E, 5)
- Use Strength Potion first for +2 Str on everything.
- With +2 Str: Strike=8, Wheel Kick=17, Eruption=11, Consecrate=7

Best damage plan Turn 1:
- Strength Potion (+2 Str)
- Consecrate(0E, 7) + Wheel Kick(2E, 17) + Strike(1E, 8) = 3E, 32 damage + draw 2
- OR: Consecrate(0E) + Eruption(2E, enters Wrath 11?) + Strike(1E, 16 in Wrath) = 3E, 32 damage but stuck in Wrath

Wait - Eruption damage question. From earlier fight: Eruption does NOT double its own damage. So Eruption = 9+2(Str) = 11 damage, THEN enters Wrath. Next attack in Wrath: Strike = (6+2)x2 = 16.

Plan A: Consecrate(7) + Eruption(11) + Strike in Wrath(16) = 34 damage. 3E. Stuck in Wrath.
Plan B: Consecrate(7) + Wheel Kick(17, draws 2) + Strike(8) = 32 damage. 3E. Not in Wrath. 

Plan B is safer (not stuck in Wrath) and draws 2 cards. But we lose 2 damage. 

Actually with Wrath - if Nob is buffing turn 1, being in Wrath turn 2 means doubled incoming when Nob attacks. Nob turn 2 hits for 32 base + his Str. In Wrath that doubles to 64+. LETHAL.

Plan B (Wheel Kick) is correct. Stay out of Wrath. Draw 2 cards.

Actually wait - Miracle is a Skill. If I play it, Nob gets +2 Str. Same with Inner Peace. Avoid all Skills.

Plan: Use Strength Potion, then play Consecrate(0E) + Wheel Kick(2E) + Strike(1E) = 3E. 
Damage: 7 + 17 + 8 = 32 damage. Draw 2 from Wheel Kick.

MARGIN NOTE: Gremlin Nob forces attack-only play. Watcher skills are mostly useless here. Kill in 3 turns with attacks + Str Potion.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Wheel Kick 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Gremlin Nob → Wheel Kick → Gremlin Nob → End Turn
events.reasoning: Attacks only vs Nob (Skills give him +2 Str). Strike(8) + Wheel Kick(17) = 25 damage. Wheel Kick draws 2. Nob is buffing so 0 incoming. Saving Eruption for kill turn.
Only attack in hand. Strike for 8 damage. Accept 6 damage + Vulnerable from Skull Bash. CANNOT play Skills - each gives Nob +2 Str via Enrage. Nob goes to 50 HP.

events.command: play Defend; play Wheel Kick 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Wheel Kick → Gremlin Nob → End Turn
events.reasoning: Must survive 31 incoming (21 Attack x1.5 Vulnerable). Defend(5 block, Nob +2 Str via Enrage) + Wheel Kick(17 damage, draws 2). Take 26 damage (30->4 HP). Nob goes to 33 HP. Must kill next turn or die.
Liquid Memories retrieves Eruption from discard pile. Need Eruption for Wrath entry to deal enough damage to kill Nob this turn (33 HP).
Retrieving Eruption from discard - need it for Wrath entry to burst down Nob.

events.command: play Consecrate; play Miracle; play Strike 0; play Vigilance; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Consecrate → Miracle → Strike → Gremlin Nob → Vigilance → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Desperate survival: 18 block + 15 damage vs 36 incoming. Likely lethal but playing it out.
